spec_gaps_discovered.gap: Spec FR7 lists 24 *-ubuntu role directories to rename. Actual count is 25. The extra is opencode-ubuntu, added by epic-add-opencode-harness AFTER the multi-distro epic. There is no opencode-alpine (opencode is Ubuntu-only by provisioner.py guard at lines 179-185). Story 04 must rename opencode-ubuntu -> opencode and remove the opencode-alpine guard from provisioner.run.

Spec FR8 names rust/uv/c as the stale bare role dirs containing Alpine code. Actual audit shows 18 of 19 stale bare dirs contain `apk:` task blocks: aws_cli, c, dart, docker, gh, go, gradle, java, kotlin, maven, mongodb, mysql, playwright, postgresql, redis, rust, sqlite, uv. Only `poetry` is clean (uses pipx). Story 04's `git rm -r` step must cover all 18 stale Alpine-bearing dirs plus the clean `poetry` dir.

playwright bare role contains four `apk:` blocks plus three Alpine comments at lines 2/43/66, but is NOT in `_ROLES_WITH_VARIANTS` — the provisioner selects it directly by bare name. Note: a `playwright-alpine` directory ALSO exists. After the epic, only the renamed playwright-ubuntu content should remain at `roles/playwright/`. The current bare playwright dir must be deleted (it's stale Alpine-only code) before the rename.

src/clauded/detect/wizard_integration.py is not listed in spec FR3 or FR9 but references `distro_override`, `_select_distro`, and `vm_distro` at four locations (lines ~30, 103, 488, 860). Stories 02 and 03 must include this file in the cleanup.

Spec mentions `vX.Y.0` as a placeholder version in the FR5 error message. Current project version is 0.2.6; this epic is a breaking-change removal. The release version should be 0.3.0 (Story 07 release). The FR5 message should either omit the version (preferred — remains valid across releases) or be parameterized at runtime via `clauded.__version__`.
Stale-role audit found `aws_cli/tasks/main.yml` contains an `apk:` block. Spec FR8 only listed rust/uv/c. The full inventory is in `similar_features.stale_role_audit` below.

Tests touching Alpine that the spec didn't enumerate: test_documentation.py (4 hits), test_detect_integration.py (4 hits with distro_override), test_database.py (1 hit on vm_distro=alpine fixture), test_wizard.py (4 hits on distro_override). Story 02/03 should sweep these too.

similar_features.sibling_epic_summary: epic-multi-distribution-support (specs/epic-multi-distribution-support/) was implemented in 7 stories (all status: done) in Feb 2026. Story 01 created src/clauded/distro.py with SUPPORTED_DISTROS=['alpine','ubuntu'], DistroProvider protocol, AlpineProvider, UbuntuProvider, get_distro_provider() factory; added vm_distro field to Config dataclass; added alpine_image block to downloads.yml; added get_alpine_image() to downloads.py. Story 02 added --distro CLI flag to cli.py, _select_distro() and distro_override param to wizard.py, _handle_distro_change() to cli.py, get_vm_distro() SSH read to lima.py. Story 03 renamed existing bare roles to -alpine suffix, added _apply_distro_suffix() and _ROLES_WITH_VARIANTS to provisioner.py, created first -ubuntu variants. Stories 04-06 created all remaining -ubuntu role variants. Story 07 added integration tests. The remove-alpine epic partially unwinds all of this.

config_validation_error_patterns.summary: ConfigValidationError defined as plain Exception subclass with no extra fields.
_validate_distro() raises ConfigValidationError with single-line f-string. This is the existing distro-validation raise site; FR5 replaces with multi-line migration message when distro=='alpine'.
_validate_version_pin and _validate_harness use multi-line message style with implicit string concatenation. Closest precedent for FR5's multi-line format.
ConfigValidationError raised for missing Ansible roles using \n concatenation. Multi-line message precedent.

past_role_migrations.pattern: git mv (rename) bare roles to -alpine suffix in single commit; simultaneously added _apply_distro_suffix() and updated tests.
past_role_migrations.note: No prior epic performed bulk role deletion. The closest inverse is FR6+FR7+FR8.

similar_features.alpine_inventory_summary: 44 files contain Alpine references across src/, tests/, docs/. Top hot-spots: tests/test_distro_change.py (38), test_distro.py (32), src/clauded/distro.py (24), tests/test_provisioner.py (23), tests/test_wizard_distro.py (22), tests/test_version_check.py (22), tests/test_config_distro.py (21), src/clauded/roles/uv/tasks/main.yml (20). Detail in similar_features.alpine_inventory_full below.

vm_distro_inventory.key_locations: line 254 (linux-arm64-musl branch), line 531 (_handle_distro_change), line 712 (--distro option), line 917 (distro_override pass-through)
line 229 (Alpine comment for who), 360 (get_vm_distro), 425 (lazy import), 427 (provider call), 501 (Alpine permissions comment)

role_directory_audit.ac5_correction_needed: AC5 says 24 final dirs but should be 25 (opencode added). Planner must update AC5 list during planning.

stale_role_audit.snippet: Alpine conditional block branches on /etc/alpine-release. Lines 34-95.
Four apk blocks plus Alpine comments. Alpine-only despite bare dir.
Clean — uses pipx install poetry. No Alpine code.

architecture.paradigm: Modular monolith with package-by-feature layout in src/clauded/. Plain modules + classes (not hexagonal). cli.py is the top of the import graph and pulls in config, wizard, lima, provisioner, downloads, distro. A thin DistroProvider protocol exists in distro.py but is only consulted from one site (lima._get_image_config); the rest of the system carries the distro as a plain string field on Config.

module_map.purpose: DistroProvider protocol + AlpineProvider + UbuntuProvider + SUPPORTED_DISTROS + get_distro_provider factory.
Config dataclass, YAML load/save. vm_distro field, _validate_distro, SUPPORTED_DISTROS import. Removal: drop vm_distro + _validate_distro; add Alpine-config hard error path in load().
Click entrypoint. Removal: --distro option, _handle_distro_change, linux-arm64-musl branch, distro_override pass-through.
Interactive wizard. Removal: _select_distro, distro_override param, answers['distro'] assignment.
Lima VM lifecycle. Removal: get_vm_distro SSH read, lazy distro import, _get_image_config branch (replace with direct ubuntu lookup), Alpine comments at lines 229/501.
Ansible playbook generator. Removal: _ROLES_WITH_VARIANTS, _apply_distro_suffix, opencode-alpine guard at lines 179-185, vm_distro playbook var, distro string in error message.
downloads.yml loader. Removal: get_alpine_image, alpine_image key from get_ansible_download_vars; simplify get_cloud_image to take no arg or strict ubuntu-only.
External download registry. Removal: alpine_image block (lines 14-17).
Detection-mode wizard wrapper. Removal: distro_override param, _select_distro call, vm_distro pass-through (lines 30, 103, 488, 860). NOT in spec but discovered via grep — planner must add.

data_flow.summary: Distro selected once (wizard or --distro) -> Config.vm_distro: str -> persisted to .clauded.yaml under vm.distro -> read by provisioner (role suffixing + playbook var), lima (image URL via DistroProvider), and cli (_handle_distro_change + linux-arm64-musl).
data_flow.after_epic: No distro state. Config has no vm_distro. Provisioner emits bare role names. Lima reads ubuntu image URL directly from downloads.yml. CLI uses linux-arm64 unconditionally.

boundary_rules: config.py is the single distro-detection point at load time (NFR2).
All distro imports from distro.py are lazy except in config.py — these all collapse on removal.
Role-name resolution is in provisioner._apply_distro_suffix; that helper is being removed and roles are emitted as bare names.

testing_and_conventions.test_directory_layout: Flat tests/ directory. No conftest.py. ~30 test files.

distro_test_files_to_remove.summary: Tests vm_distro field validation and YAML round-trip

test_files_to_amend.summary: Strip TestApplyDistroSuffix class, opencode-alpine tests, alpine fixture references.
Strip vm_distro='alpine' from Config fixtures (~18 references).
Add the new Alpine-config rejection test (FR5).

lint.command: uv run ruff check src/ tests/

format.command: uv run ruff format src/ tests/ && uv run ruff check --fix src/ tests/

build.custom_hook: hatch_build.py writes _build_info.py with __commit__ from git rev-parse

docs.doc_style: Markdown with ATX headings, fenced code blocks with language tags, tables via pipe syntax.

project_specific_constraints: uv only; no pip direct usage
CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] entry required for every feature/fix
Boy-scout rule: fix small adjacent issues in passing
No file: state: absent on Lima mount paths (safety rule)
Code is fully responsible for VM setup; no handling of unexpected configurations
